name: com.myunitypackage.interactions
description: A comprehensive Unity package providing a flexible and extensible interaction system. Supports multiple interaction types including click, hover, and custom interactions with easy-to-use components and event handlers for enhanced user experience in Unity applications.

samples.description: Comprehensive sample scenes demonstrating various interaction types, component configurations, and event handling patterns. Includes practical examples for click, hover, and custom interaction implementations to help you get started quickly.
